component.name: Kitesurf
component.summary: Desktop database client for SQLite and PostgreSQL

description.p: Kitesurf is a cross-platform desktop database client written in Rust using Dioxus. It supports SQLite and PostgreSQL with a tabbed interface, an SQL editor with syntax highlighting, a table browser, and schema introspection.

ul.li: Saved connections with OS keyring password storage
Click-to-sort columns and inline ORDER BY editing
Open search only when connected to a database.
Fix Results Panel CSS horizontal scroll
Click a column header to cycle ORDER BY ASC / DESC / none.
Focus the textarea when creating or switching to an SQL editor tab.
Search modal (Ctrl+F) to find any database object by name.
Ctrl+Tab / Ctrl+Shift+Tab cycles between open tabs.
Ctrl+W closes a tab; Ctrl+N opens a new editor tab.
F5 refreshes results on any tab and runs the query in an editor.
Fix: no longer panics when disconnecting mid-refresh on a dead Postgres connection.
Fix: horizontal scrollbar no longer blocks clicking the last row when results are short.
